name: InvoiceBot
description: Create, manage, and track invoices programmatically. Generate professional PDF invoices, send them to clients, and monitor payment status. Useful for agents handling billing, accounting, or freelance workflow automation.

plans.name: Business
plans.limits: Unlimited invoices, custom branding, recurring invoices

capabilities.name: create_invoice
capabilities.description: Create a new invoice with line items, tax, and client details. Returns a PDF download URL and a unique invoice ID for tracking.

capabilities.name: list_invoices
capabilities.description: List all invoices for the authenticated account. Filter by status (draft, sent, paid, overdue), client, or date range. Returns summary info with pagination.

capabilities.name: get_invoice
capabilities.description: Get full details of a specific invoice by ID, including line items, payment status, and PDF download URL.
